/TWS/CH1 ISS PROB 3 Y PJ 20 D/CTS 8/SWAPD 09-15-09/PF390/VF1/FOP1 3 MONTHLVAL/LCHEM/IID:1/RESTV/X:COMPLETE ONE YEAR OF ALCOHOL COUNSELING TO BE MONITORED BY APD/PC/SECFEE/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A)VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:TIME ESTIMATE 3 HRS,/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO06-09-09,/X: BAIL SET AT NO BAIL/

/CAL: ARRAIGNEMNT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/OR/X:CONDITIONS OF OR, DO NOT DRIVE WITHOUT VALID CDL & ATTEND 2 AA MTGS WKLY/987,2/CONTD TO BE SET, DOP/CONTD:TO SET/DOP/
